title: Daoist Canon: Yellow Court Scripture (Outer) (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Yellow Court Scripture (Outer)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Yellow Court Scripture (Outer)

translation.text: From the Yellow Court Scripture (Outer) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
